log: === INITIATIVE ===

=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 23 damage. Githyanki — Armored Escapist HP: 36/59

Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Githyanki — Armored Escapist HP: 18/59
⚡ Githyanki — Armored Escapist casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:2 total 12 vs AC 20 — now MISSES!
--- Githyanki — Armored Escapist's turn ---
Githyanki — Armored Escapist casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Githyanki — Armored Escapist casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Githyanki — Armored Escapist for 7. HP: 48/59
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Githyanki — Armored Escapist's turn ---
Githyanki — Armored Escapist casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 10 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 14 damage. Githyanki — Armored Escapist HP: 34/59
→ Githyanki — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Githyanki — Armored Escapist HP: 12/59
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Githyanki — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
